   - "Cycling Adventure" - This exactly matches "Cycling Adventure" with a rating of 9
   - "Tapas Bar Crawl" - This corresponds to "Tapas Bar" in the night_activities section with a rating of 7

5. **Additional Services - Dining**: The package mentions pre-booked gluten-free friendly restaurants. While specific restaurant ratings are provided in the ground-truth data, the package doesn't specify exact restaurant names, only mentions "Mediterranean cafés" and the Tapas Bar crawl (already counted above). Since no specific restaurants from the ground-truth list are named in the final package beyond the general description, I cannot map specific restaurant ratings.

The items I can definitively map are: Barcelona Spain (destination), Standard Airlines Economy Class (transportation), Cityscape Hotel (accommodation), Kayaking (activity), Cycling Adventure (activity), and Tapas Bar (night activity - for the crawl).
